Stat: 58% of consumers consider UGC the most authentic form of content
Source (details): Stackla: Consumer & Marketing Perspectives on Content in the Digital Age, 2019.

Stat: 79% of people say UGC highly impacts their purchasing decisions, yet only 13% said content from a brand is impactful.
Source (details): Stackla: Consumer & Marketing Perspectives on Content in the Digital Age, 2019.

Stat: 56% of consumers say the types of content they most want to see from brands are user-generated photos and videos
Source (details): Stackla: Consumer & Marketing Perspectives on Content in the Digital Age, 2019.

Stat: Consumers are 2.4x more likely to say UGC is authentic compared to brand-created content
Source (details): Stackla: Consumer & Marketing Perspectives on Content in the Digital Age, 2019.

Stat: 85% of consumers consider how recently a review was written to inform their purchase decision
Source (details): Survey of 5,000 consumers in the U.S., Canada, UK, France, and Germany

Stat: Less than half (47%) of consumers think product reviews older than three months are still relevant, and only 25% of shoppers feel that a review retains its value after 12 months
Source (details): Survey of 5,000 consumers in the U.S., Canada, UK, France, and Germany

Stat: More than half (55%) of consumers would rather purchase a product with fewer reviews written in the past three months than a product with more reviews written over a year ago.
Source (details): Survey of 5,000 consumers in the U.S., Canada, UK, France, and Germany

Stat: 81% of consumers consider review recency equal to or more important than the quantity of reviews on a product.
Source (details): Survey of 5,000 consumers in the U.S., Canada, UK, France, and Germany

Stat: A majority of consumers would rather purchase a product with fewer, recent reviews over a product with more, older reviews (59% vs. 20%).
Source (details): Survey of 5,000 consumers in the U.S., Canada, UK, France, and Germany

Stat: Peer reviews impact up to 93% of purchase decisions
Source (details):
The Walker Sands Future of Retail 2019 study surveyed 1,600
consumers across the United States on their shopping habits,
preferences and views on emerging retail technology. The
survey was conducted online in March 2019 and has a 2%
margin of error at a 95% confidence level.

Stat: 74% of U.S. consumers consider reviews either very or moderately important in making a purchasing decision.
Source (details): Uberall: Global Benchmark Report, 2018.

Stat: 65% of U.S. shoppers think merchants should respond to all online reviews. 78% of those shoppers expect a response to have at least some degree of personalization. Only 18% thought retailers should respond only to negative reviews.
Source (details): Uberall: Global Benchmark Report, 2018.

Stat: Customers are 2x as likely to purchase a product with a negative review if the brand responds to the original comment.
Source (details): Bazaarvoice Shopper Experience Index, 2020.

Stat: 34% of customers who receive a satisfactory reply to their complaint will delete their original negative review.
Source (details): Bazaarvoice Shopper Experience Index, 2020.

Stat: 70% of dissatisfied customers say they will do business with a company again if their complaint is resolved.
Source (details): Credibly: How Complaint Handling Can Drive Your Business’s Growth, 2019.

Stat: Conversion rates increase by up to 150% when visitors interact with images displayed with Galleries.
Source (details): Bazaarvoice website

Stat: Time on site increases by up to 250% when visitors interact with images displayed with Galleries.
Source (details): Bazaarvoice website

Stat: Average order value increases by up to 15% when visitors interact with images displayed with Galleries.
Source (details): Bazaarvoice website

Stat: 81% of shoppers say they are more likely to buy a product if the product page has reviews.
Source (details): Bazaarvoice survey of 8,000 global consumers.

Stat: 66% of shoppers say they are more likely to buy a product if the product page has customer photos.
Source (details): Bazaarvoice survey of 8,000 global consumers.

Stat: 62% of shoppers say they are more likely to buy a product if the product page has customer videos.
Source (details): Bazaarvoice survey of 8,000 global consumers.

Stat: 29% of shoppers prefer customer reviews with photos or videos.
Source (details): Bazaarvoice survey of 8,000 global consumers.

Stat: 64% of consumers prefer visual UGC rather than professional imagery.
Source (details): Bazaarvoice survey of 8,000 global consumers.

Stat: 61% of consumers prefer fresh visual UGC shared at least weekly by brands.
Source (details): Bazaarvoice survey of 8,000 global consumers.

Stat: 24% of consumers say video UGC is influential because it shows them something not obvious from the product listing.
Source (details): Bazaarvoice survey of 8,000 global consumers.

Stat: When company responses were provided on negative reviews, 37% of test subjects factored the site’s response positively into the evaluation of both the negative reviews and their evaluation of the product.
Source (details): Baymard Institute: Product page usability testing, 2019.
